---
title: "Projects"
---

# Projects

## Current and Ongoing Research Projects

### Bayesian Spatiotemporal Modeling of Malaria Burden in Ethiopia

This project focuses on modeling malaria burden in Ethiopia using Bayesian hierarchical spatiotemporal methods and Global Burden of Disease estimates.

### Maternal and Newborn Health Analytics

Research projects focused on maternal healthcare utilization, newborn postnatal care, neonatal mortality, and infant mortality using Ethiopian health survey data.

### Public Health Artificial Intelligence

Application of machine learning, interpretable AI, and clinical prediction models for public health and biomedical research.

### Federated Learning for Healthcare Research

Development and application of privacy-preserving federated learning methods for multi-center healthcare data analysis.

### Reproducible Research Platform

Development of open, transparent, and reproducible workflows using R, Quarto, GitHub, and statistical programming tools.

## Future Project Areas

- Malaria and infectious disease modeling
- Maternal and child health prediction
- Clinical epidemiology and survival analysis
- AI-assisted public health decision-making
- Statistical training materials for students and researchers
